rationale: Educ. Code §29.902 governs driver education programs in public schools and has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 29.902. DRIVER EDUCATION. (a) The Texas Department of Licensing and Regulation shall develop a program of organized instruction in driver education and traffic safety for public school students.
_note: No conflict. The cited rule addresses driver education curriculum and certification, not property tax exemptions or school funding mechanisms affected by homestead exemption changes.
